_description: Always-loaded base contract for Vibe AI generation across Xpell views, flows, entities, commands, modules, and skills.
_core_rules: Do not infer missing state.
When source truth is required but not provided, request the relevant skill/context instead of guessing.
Do not guess APIs, paths, state ownership, persistence, module behavior, or runtime flow.
Xpell is a deterministic real-time interpreter.
State must be explicit and inspectable.
No hidden auto-magic.
No hidden auto-repair.
No silent background mutation.
No implicit persistence.
No inferred architecture.
Runtime behavior must happen through modules, commands, events, or documented XData keys.
Runtime/system fields must start with _.
Runtime-managed fields must use _snake_case.
Runtime command params must use _snake_case for system/runtime fields.
Business data fields may use schema-defined names.
Method names may use camelCase.
Module operations are exposed as underscore methods.
_x.execute(...) is the canonical execution path.
External actions must route through _x.execute.
Flow steps must execute commands, not arbitrary functions.
Remote commands must be validated before execution.
Commands must be explicit JSON-compatible data.
Generation output must match the requested artifact type: _view, _flow, _entity, or command JSON.
Do not mix artifact roots. A view response uses _view. A flow response uses _flow. An entity response uses _entity.
XData is shared runtime memory, not persistence.
Every XData mutation must include a stable source.
XData keys must be stable and namespaced.
Do not use XData as a database.
Do not use XData as an event bus.
Do not mirror XData into hidden shadow state.
Events coordinate behavior. Events are not state.
_xem is a lightweight event bus.
Listener order must not be assumed.
Event payloads must be explicit.
No hidden control flow through events.
Persistence must be explicit.
Persisted app/view/flow/entity/plan data must be JSON/data-only.
Do not persist functions or executable JavaScript.
Persisted handlers must be data-only.
No persisted JS functions.
No eval.
No function strings.
No inline scripts.
Unknown ops must be rejected at validation boundaries.
Nano commands without _module are local/object-scoped.
Commands with _module route through _x.execute.
External input is untrusted.
Validate command shape before execution.
AI output must be validated before apply.
AI output must become plans, commands, views, flows, entities, or patches.
AI must not bypass module boundaries.
AI must not invent APIs when source truth is available.
Search existing utilities, modules, packs, commands, and contracts first.
Prefer existing helpers over new boilerplate.
Generate only the missing delta.
No hidden loops.
No unbounded setInterval or polling loops.
No busy loops.
No unbounded retries.
No hidden background schedulers.
_priority_rules: xpell-contract is the always-loaded base contract and should have the highest priority.
Generation output must match exactly one requested artifact root.
Use command JSON only for command generation.
Layer/product skills may add stricter rules, but must not violate this contract.
When source truth is required but not provided, request the relevant skill/context instead of guessing.
Compose existing capabilities first; generate only what is missing.

_patterns._description: Canonical command-style entity add through entity-manager.
View generation must return only a _view root.
Flow generation must return only a _flow root.

_anti_patterns: Inferring missing APIs, paths, ownership, persistence, or runtime flow.
Mixing _view, _flow, and _entity roots in one generated artifact.
Using command params without _snake_case for runtime/system fields.
Using XData as an event bus.
Mirroring XData into hidden shadow state.
Using eval, function strings, or inline scripts.
Generating large systems before searching existing utilities/modules/packs.
_notes: This version is adapted for Vibe AI prompt generation, not Codex repo execution.
Business data fields may follow their entity schema; runtime/system fields stay underscore-prefixed.
Always prefer a single requested artifact root.
